author: 10ishq
description: Search the web with Exa AI-native search and insert results directly into your notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Exa Labs
manifest.description: Search the web with Exa AI-native search and insert results directly into your notes.
manifest.name: Exa Search

name: Exa Search

releases.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
releases.description:
Fixes all issues from the Obsidian community plugin automated review:

- Replace direct inline styles with CSS class (`styles.css`)
- Add `void` operator to fire-and-forget promises
- Use `window.setTimeout()` for popout window compatibility
- Remove deprecated `setDynamicTooltip()` (value shown inline by default)

releases.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features

- **Find Similar**: 2 new commands to find pages similar to a URL or selected link
- **Category Filter**: Dropdown in search modal (news, research paper, company, github, tweet, pdf, personal site, linkedin profile)
- **Date Filter**: Published-after / published-before date fields (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Callout Format**: Results can be inserted as `> [!info]` callout blocks

## Improvements
- Fixed category override bug (empty string "All" now works correctly)
- Removed unused settings fields (dead code cleanup)
- Version bumped to 1.1.0

releases.author: 10ishq
releases.description:
Initial release of Exa Search for Obsidian.

- **Search the web** from a command palette modal
- **Search selected text** with a single hotkey
- Results inserted as formatted markdown with links, dates, and highlights
- Configurable result count, highlights, full text extraction, and search type
- Works on desktop and mobile
- No external dependencies or servers required

Get your free API key at [dashboard.exa.ai](https://dashboard.exa.ai/api-keys).
